subcodes.first_line: This is the day when the joy of the manifestation of the Most Great Name hath encompassed the world, yet most of the servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که فرح ظهور اسم اعظم عالم را احاطه نموده ولکن اکثری از عباد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
